project(NitroAiImage)
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.9.0)

set(PACKAGE_NAME NitroAiImage)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)

add_library(${PACKAGE_NAME} SHARED
  src/main/cpp/cpp-adapter.cpp
)

# Pull in everything generated by nitrogen (specs, JNI glue, bridging headers, etc.)
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../nitrogen/generated/android/NitroAiImage+autolinking.cmake)

# Expo/RN source builds can sometimes expose Prefab packages as header-only
# imported targets during our configure step. In that case CMake finds Nitro's
# headers but omits the backing .so from the final link line, which leaves
# margelo::nitro::* unresolved at link time. Fall back to the real shared
# library if the imported target has no binary location attached.
function(aiimage_link_prefab_fallback package_target shared_lib_name)
  if(NOT TARGET ${package_target})
    return()
  endif()

  get_target_property(_imported_location ${package_target} IMPORTED_LOCATION)
  get_target_property(_imported_location_debug ${package_target} IMPORTED_LOCATION_DEBUG)
  get_target_property(_imported_location_release ${package_target} IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE)

  if(_imported_location OR _imported_location_debug OR _imported_location_release)
    return()
  endif()

  set(_candidate_paths)
  foreach(_root ${CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH})
    if(EXISTS "${_root}")
      file(GLOB_RECURSE _matches LIST_DIRECTORIES false "${_root}/lib${shared_lib_name}.so")
      list(APPEND _candidate_paths ${_matches})
    endif()
  endforeach()

  list(REMOVE_DUPLICATES _candidate_paths)
  list(LENGTH _candidate_paths _candidate_count)
  if(_candidate_count GREATER 0)
    list(GET _candidate_paths 0 _fallback_path)
    message(STATUS "[NitroAiImage] Prefab target ${package_target} has no binary location; linking ${_fallback_path} directly.")
    target_link_libraries(${PACKAGE_NAME} ${_fallback_path})
  endif()
endfunction()

aiimage_link_prefab_fallback(react-native-nitro-modules::NitroModules NitroModules)

find_library(LOG_LIB log)

target_link_libraries(
  ${PACKAGE_NAME}
  ${LOG_LIB}
  android
)
